idea.title: Niche Keeper
idea.hook: Design the smallest stable ecosystem where every species has exactly one food source and one predator — leave any niche empty and cascade extinctions collapse the whole web.
idea.prototype: Living food-web SIM puzzle: drag/tap species into niche slots so each has 1 prey + 1 predator; populations breed/starve/overpopulate live; weather drought/invasive/disease/climate events across 10 escalating biomes.
idea.why_novel: build the SMALLEST stable food web — every species needs exactly one prey and one predator; empty niches cascade-collapse the whole web
idea.non_timer_pressure: stability meter that decays per broken niche + extinction count (3 = game over); no countdown timer

sources.title: Niche Keeper
sources.snippet: Design the smallest stable ecosystem; every species has one food source and one predator; empty niches cascade extinctions.

sources.title: Large-sample analysis beats one example
sources.snippet: watch sample size and success probability

sources.title: BioEden — cozy planetary-reserve strategy
sources.snippet: a 'cozy' strategy about a planetary-scale nature reserve — ecosystem-keeping has market pull

synthesizer_brief: #2 opportunity (76.8, build_now), paired with Grain Road in the Daily Build Mix; built as a living SIM (sim=100% liked in our portfolio) not an abstract puzzle (puzzle=40%); deep 10-min loop.

alternatives.title: Grain Road
alternatives.hook: Arbitrage grain across Silk Road cities; your bulk trades move prices against you.
alternatives.why_novel: market-impact pricing (built today as the sibling new game)

alternatives.title: Court Traitor
alternatives.hook: Advise the king while secretly serving a rival court.

alternatives.title: Invasive Spread
alternatives.hook: Spread as an invasive plant but never form a cluster of 3+ connected tiles.

alternatives.title: Sonar Watch
alternatives.hook: Classify inbound contacts by movement before they breach the perimeter.
